game_name: Broken Sword: The Shadow of the Templars

sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented. Point-and-click adventure game with pre-rendered backgrounds; sub-pixel precision not applicable to gameplay mechanics.

tier_notes: Broken Sword is a point-and-click adventure game, not a platformer or action game. The game uses the Virtual Theatre engine and features pre-rendered backgrounds with character navigation via cursor-based movement. Traditional physics parameters (jump velocity, gravity, acceleration) are not applicable to this game paradigm. No quantitative or qualitative movement/physics data is documented in the available source material.
